item.title: Re: JS Site Crit Team post
JS Site Crit Team post
item.content:encoded:
Hello SecretCrow! I've noted that your article has no feedback despite being positively rated, so I am stepping in to provide some of my own as a member of the Site Crit Team.

+ show block
– hide block

ConProcs:

Any found victims are to be

Wording. Maybe something like "Anyone identified as a victim…" would catch better.

Any found mention of

Same thing as the previous. "Any mention of" is perfectly fine. We couldn't talk about mentions we didn't find anyway.

Description:

However, marketing SCP-4145 claims

I think you missed a word here. "However, marketing for…"

Patient Interview:
In general, the last paragraph, the big block from Meyers, strikes me pretty weird. She's very nonchalant about her doctor not having a face.

Incident Report:
This is short and effective but I feel that relaying the upgraded procedures would have been good. This could have been bolted onto the story better.

From this point on, you do a nice job with the funky whacky Oneiroi sort of motif. It has high "Wtf" factor with Oneiroi articles absolutely must have IMO.

In general; the midsection of this article isn't very tight but I can't really fault that for being a jamcon entry with no real time to massage these elements. I would consider carefully how big if an expository dump you want your middle logs to take (the interview for example) and weigh that out into smaller bites. Nothing about that interview feels natural to me and, ironically, the slang used to make it feel more natural actually made it worse.

Beyond that, this was a good work to build off of. Very good stuff for just your second scip.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Really excited to post my second ever skip. Really proud of it considering its a jamcon thing. Hope you guys love weird Oneiroi stuff!

Credits
Close

Thank you to RockTeethMothEyes and magnadeus for the amazing crit!
Thank you to NewyRose for the Snapchat css!

Oneiroi code from templates on the hub.

Oneroi Heading and symbol- Oneiroi Hub
Colorful pfp- https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Category:Thumbnails_(images)#/media/File:IndexedColorSample_(Mosaic).png
Cat pfp- https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Negitive.jpg
Advertisement background- https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Category:Dreams#/media/File:Simplicity_at_it%27s_peak.jpg
Oneiroi pfp- By me
